# ngrok_application_session (Data Source)



## Example Usage

```terraform
data "ngrok_application_session" "example" {
  id = "app_sess_2example"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) a resource identifier

### Read-Only

- `application_user_id` (String) The ID of the application user associated with this session.
- `created_at` (String) timestamp when the user was created in RFC 3339 format
- `edge_id` (String) The ID of the edge associated with this session.
- `endpoint_id` (String) The ID of the endpoint associated with this session.
- `expires_at` (String) timestamp when session expires in RFC 3339 format
- `last_active` (String) timestamp when the user was last active in RFC 3339 format
- `public_url` (String) URL of the hostport served by this endpoint
- `route_id` (String) The ID of the route associated with this session.
- `uri` (String) URI of the application session API resource
